name: skill-watcher
description: Observe Codex skill usage logs and propose evidence-backed skill maintenance updates.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain skills from observed usage evidence
interface.longDescription: Skill Watcher provides a local Codex plugin MVP for collecting redacted skill usage events, summarizing repeated outcomes, and proposing bounded SKILL.md maintenance updates without automatically modifying source skills.
defaultPrompt: Analyze recent skill usage and propose a maintenance update
